title: Why locals may hear gunshots and see military helicopters in Edinburgh on Tuesday

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Why locals may hear gunshots and see military helicopters in Edinburgh on Tuesday. POLICE have warned the public not to be alarmed if they hear gunshots and see armed police or military helicopters in Edinburgh on Tuesday.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Why locals may hear gunshots and see military helicopters in Edinburgh on Tuesday
